productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge so Shelter Rise earns one protected post-rejoin grapple while Signal Cut retains fall pressure until a deliberate Stormlock vent; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.scope: Next Ledge post-rest safe-versus-pressure route choice
lastRefinementUnit.result: Counterwind Rest now opens one readable mint recovery line and one amber signal shortcut at +46 pressure; both paths use the existing route/cargo/pressure owners and converge at Fork Relay.

lastCompletedUnit.scope: Next Ledge first post-rejoin branch consequence
lastCompletedUnit.result: Fork Relay now carries the chosen branch into Stormlock Restore: Shelter Rise grants one protected grapple and Signal Cut retains 45 fall pressure until a deliberate vent.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All 28 Next Ledge test entrypoints and changed-file syntax passed. Playwright traversed both changed branches through public session input, proved the protected safe catch and retained-pressure shortcut vent, reached a real dead state and keyboard retry, completed the final cleanup replay, checked closed/open/closed Advanced disclosure, stable settled DOM/entity/descriptor counts, and zero console messages. Human View passed first-screen, active consequence, and resolved screenshots; matched clean-browser FPS improved from 16.54 to 33.96 and p95 frame time improved from 82.50 ms to 34.30 ms.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Validated production unit is ready for the owned production and receipt commits; ProtoKits is unchanged and synchronized at 04d34f049f58ae359cf71d43466c429dac2a6d08.

exactNextUnit.goal: Add one immediate post-Stormlock payoff anchor where safe protection becomes a faster launch window and shortcut cargo opens a harder amber high line, without a new control or state owner.
